title: Jeikir's Pig Variants
description: This resource pack adds 9 unique pig variants to the game!
body:
- https://linktr.ee/jeikir -

===|

This resource pack adds 9 unique pig variants to the game!

 

pigs have new color variations!
also they can be dirty!

This resource pack requires OptiFine HD U H9
 

 

===|

You can use this resource pack for your videos, but you must provide a link to the mod's page.
